title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: - **Missing completion gate definition**: [`AGENTS.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md) has recovery/fallback rules but no explicit “production verification is complete only when …” clause. Suggestion: add a new subsection under `## 6. Workflow Ownership` (or new `## Production Verification Completion Gate`) defining mandatory PASS evidence: GHA rerun ID, first-fail→recovery-pass log evidence, and `council-status.json` fields (`baseline_trio_gate`, `recovery_attempted`, `recovery_failure_reason`). - **Missing operator-facing PASS checklist**: [`README.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/README.md) documents `/vote` contract and smoke checks, but not the minimum production-proof checklist to close a prod-verification task. Suggestion: add a short checklist section near `/vote` contract clarifying local smoke/tests are insufficient without one successful GHA council recovery proof. - **Missing codex-side “no local-only PASS claim” rule + enforcement**: [`CODEX.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/CODEX.md) `## Verification Rule` lacks an explicit prohibition on declaring production PASS from local checks only; [`scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh) / [`tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh) therefore do not enforce this completion policy. Suggestion: add one policy bullet to `CODEX.md` Verification Rule and corresponding `assert_contains` checks in `check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh` (test wrapper can stay unchanged).
